name: Stock Insights Dashboard
description: A real-time stock market insights and analytics dashboard providing comprehensive market data visualization and analysis tools.
longDescription: Built a production-ready dashboard for stock market insights with real-time data feeds, interactive charts, and advanced analytics. Deployed on Railway with optimized performance and responsive design.

name: CanopyAds.io
description: Modern advertising platform solution with advanced targeting and analytics capabilities.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive advertising platform with campaign management, audience targeting, and performance analytics. Built with modern web technologies for scalability and user experience.

name: Claude MCP Plugin Suite
description: Built a suite of Model Context Protocol (MCP) server tools for Claude AI: PII Detector for real-time data redaction, Insomnia cURL Generator with Insomnia collection export, Caveman Compressor for payload optimization, and Audit & Reset for API session management. Enables AI-native API development workflows.
longDescription: Production-ready MCP (Model Context Protocol) server plugins for Claude AI that transform how developers interact with APIs. The suite includes: a PII Detector that performs real-time sensitive data redaction in API payloads before they reach LLM context; an Insomnia cURL Generator that converts API calls to cURL commands with one-click Insomnia collection export; a Caveman Compressor that optimizes payload size for token efficiency; and an Audit & Reset tool for complete API session lifecycle management. Together these plugins enable AI-assisted API development workflows inside Claude's agentic environment.

architecture.tools: PII Detector, cURL Generator, Payload Compressor, Session Manager

highlights: Real-time PII detection and redaction in API payloads
One-click Insomnia collection export from cURL
Payload size optimization for token efficiency

name: Market Decoder
description: AI-powered news summarizer that processes financial market news and provides intelligent summaries.
longDescription: Built an AI-powered news summarization system specifically for financial markets. Uses advanced NLP and AI models to extract key insights from news articles, providing traders and analysts with concise, actionable summaries.
